g.text: TIPMAP: SV-centered TE-SV discovery from pangenome variation
PanPop SV genotypes and pairwise true-ALT evidence are reduced to annotated TE alleles and a genotype-aware TIP map.
VCF-aware parsing of PanPop and query evidence
Editable SVG generated with R/svglite; schematic proportions preserve the biological decision logic.
